name: animdeck
description: A Claude Code plugin that converts bullet-list markdown into PowerPoint presentations with click-to-appear animations.

scripts.sync: rsync -av --delete --exclude=node_modules --exclude=.git --exclude='*.pptx' --exclude='*.animation.json' ./ "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/local-plugins/animdeck/1.0.0/" && echo "✓ Synced source → Claude plugin cache"

author: Ji Soo Yi
